description: Single-agent fork patch: make Phase 3.4 commit-plan display non-blocking when all included files are recognized task work.
changelog:
**Workflow:**
- Phase 3.4 still shows a batched commit plan, but the plan is no longer a required confirmation gate when every included file is recognized current-session task work.
- The AI commits recognized task work after displaying the plan and only pauses when dirty file ownership is ambiguous.
- Finish-work and trellis-meta references now describe the non-blocking commit flow consistently.
notes: Run `trellis update` to refresh workflow.md, finish-work prompts, and trellis-meta workflow references. No migration required because file paths did not change.
